entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume grown in spring as a rainfed crop in West Asia and North Africa regions.

entities.name: WEST ASIA AND NORTH AFRICA
entities.description: Regions where chickpea is grown as a rainfed crop with variable rainfall.

entities.name: MOISTURE SUPPLY
entities.description: The availability and distribution of water, which affects chickpea yield and adaptation.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The amount of grain produced per unit area, used to measure crop productivity.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity in genetic makeup among cultivars that influences their response to environmental factors.

entities.name: BREEDING STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches used to develop chickpea cultivars that are best-adapted to moisture variation.

entities.name: LINE-SOURCE SPRINKLER IRRIGATION SYSTEM
entities.description: An irrigation method used to create a soil moisture gradient for studying crop response.

entities.name: TEL HADYA
entities.description: A site in northern Syria where the chickpea moisture supply studies were conducted.

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: Environmental factor that, along with rainfall, influences grain yield and adaptation requirements.

entities.name: RESPONSIVENESS TO MOISTURE SUPPLY
entities.description: The degree to which grain yield increases in response to increased moisture supply, measured as a regression slope.

entities.name: YIELD POTENTIAL
entities.description: The maximum yield achievable by a cultivar under optimal conditions.

entities.name: DROUGHT YIELD
entities.description: The grain yield achieved under rainfed or low moisture conditions.

entities.name: WIDE ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of a cultivar to maintain high yields across varying moisture supplies and environmental conditions.

entities.name: EARLY PHENOLOGY
entities.description: The timing of developmental stages, specifically early maturity, which aids adaptation in high-temperature years.

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of grain yield to total biomass produced by the plant.

entities.name: ROOT SYSTEM DEPTH
entities.description: The depth to which the plant roots penetrate the soil to access water.

entities.name: PRE-DAWN LEAF WATER POTENTIAL
entities.description: A physiological measure of the plant's water status before sunrise.
